# CS Media

> CS MEDIA, LLC is a Kentucky-based real estate media company providing drone photography, cinematic video, interior/exterior photography, and virtual staging. FAA Part 107 certified. Based in Leitchfield, KY. Packages start at $85 with 24–48 hour delivery.

## About the business

- Owner: Hocheris Chanthavong
- Location: Leitchfield, Kentucky (Grayson County) — serves all of Kentucky
- Phone: +1-270-307-0173
- Email: cscreatesmediallc@gmail.com
- Pricing: $85 (aerial only), $140 (interior + exterior, no drone), $200 (Photo Package with drone, most popular), $280 (Full Package — Standard, with 30–45s listing video), $380 (Full Package — Pro, with 60–90s cinematic video); virtual staging +$25 per photo or +$50 per video scene
- Add-ons: Twilight Edit +$25/photo, Rush Delivery 24hr +$40, Additional Photos +$5/image
- Revisions: 1 free per package (2 on Pro); additional revisions $15 each; major edits quoted separately; requests must be submitted within 3 days of delivery
- Pricing notes: 6% sales tax and 2-way mileage from Leitchfield applied to final pricing outside Grayson County
- Turnaround: 24–48 hours for all deliverables
- Credentials: FAA Part 107 certified for commercial drone operations

## Core pages

- [Home](https://www.cscreatesmedia.com/): Overview of services, recent work, testimonials, and booking
- [About](https://www.cscreatesmedia.com/about): Owner background, credentials, and service philosophy
- [Services Hub](https://www.cscreatesmedia.com/services): 3-card overview of service lines (Real Estate / Events / Video Production)
- [Real Estate Photography & Pricing](https://www.cscreatesmedia.com/services/real-estate): Cornerstone page — full packages, add-ons, virtual staging, service-area coverage, and real estate FAQ
- [Event Photography](https://www.cscreatesmedia.com/services/events): Weddings, baby showers, birthdays, and special occasions
- [Video Production](https://www.cscreatesmedia.com/services/video-production): Promo videos, social reels, and business content for Kentucky brands
- [Portfolio](https://www.cscreatesmedia.com/portfolio): Project case studies across real estate, drone work, and events
- [Blog](https://www.cscreatesmedia.com/blog): Articles for Kentucky real estate agents on listing media
- [Book a Shoot](https://www.cscreatesmedia.com/book): Scheduling and quote-request page

## Services offered

- **Real Estate Photography** — Interior and exterior shoots with HDR processing and professional lighting
- **Drone Photography & Video** — FAA Part 107 certified aerial coverage of property, lot, and surroundings
- **Listing Video** — 30–90 second walkthrough videos bundled into Full Packages (Standard $280, Pro $380 with cinematic color grading)
- **Virtual Staging** — Digital furnishing of empty rooms, +$25 per photo (or +$50 per video scene)

## Service areas

CS Media serves all of Kentucky with dedicated city pages for the primary markets:

- [Leitchfield, KY](https://www.cscreatesmedia.com/leitchfield-real-estate-photography): Home market (Grayson County). No mileage fees. Farms, acreage, residential, and Rough River area rentals.
- [Elizabethtown, KY](https://www.cscreatesmedia.com/elizabethtown-real-estate-photography): Hardin County market — residential and Fort Knox-area properties
- [Bowling Green, KY](https://www.cscreatesmedia.com/bowling-green-real-estate-photography): Warren County — residential and new construction
- [Owensboro, KY](https://www.cscreatesmedia.com/owensboro-real-estate-photography): Daviess County — urban and suburban listings
- [Bardstown, KY](https://www.cscreatesmedia.com/bardstown-real-estate-photography): Nelson County — historic homes and rural properties
- [Radcliff, KY](https://www.cscreatesmedia.com/radcliff-real-estate-photography): Hardin County — Fort Knox-area properties (LAANC airspace)
- [Hodgenville, KY](https://www.cscreatesmedia.com/hodgenville-real-estate-photography): LaRue County — farms, country residential, Lincoln Heritage tourism rentals
- [Hardinsburg, KY](https://www.cscreatesmedia.com/hardinsburg-real-estate-photography): Breckinridge County — farms, hunting properties, Ohio River frontage
- [Brandenburg, KY](https://www.cscreatesmedia.com/brandenburg-real-estate-photography): Meade County — Doe Valley resort, Ohio River frontage
- [Shepherdsville, KY](https://www.cscreatesmedia.com/shepherdsville-real-estate-photography): Bullitt County — Louisville suburbs, Bernheim Forest area
- [Caneyville, KY](https://www.cscreatesmedia.com/caneyville-real-estate-photography): Eastern Grayson County — local, no mileage fees
- [Munfordville, KY](https://www.cscreatesmedia.com/munfordville-real-estate-photography): Hart County — I-65 corridor, Mammoth Cave-area rentals

## Portfolio projects

- [Stone Estate Aerial](https://www.cscreatesmedia.com/portfolio/stone-estate-aerial): Aerial and interior coverage of a Kentucky stone estate
- [Modern Farmhouse](https://www.cscreatesmedia.com/portfolio/modern-farmhouse): Farmhouse on acreage with combined drone and ground photography
- [Country Home on Acreage](https://www.cscreatesmedia.com/portfolio/country-home-acreage): Rural property with aerial lot coverage and interior shots
- [Twilight Showcase](https://www.cscreatesmedia.com/portfolio/twilight-showcase): Twilight exterior and aerial photography
- [Drone Property Tour](https://www.cscreatesmedia.com/portfolio/drone-property-tour): Aerial property walkthrough
- [Local Business Promo](https://www.cscreatesmedia.com/portfolio/local-business-promo): Commercial promo video
- [Town Events Highlights](https://www.cscreatesmedia.com/portfolio/town-events-coverage): Community event coverage

## Blog articles

- [Why Your Listing Isn't Getting Showings (And How to Fix It)](https://www.cscreatesmedia.com/blog/why-your-listing-isnt-getting-showings): How listing photography quality affects showing requests and days on market, with data from NAR and RealTrends
- [How Much Does a Real Estate Photographer Cost in Kentucky?](https://www.cscreatesmedia.com/blog/real-estate-photography-cost-kentucky): Market-rate pricing for real estate photography in Kentucky and what's included at each price point

## Common questions

- Aerial-only is $85; Interior + Exterior (no drone) is $140; Photo Package with drone is $200; Full Package — Standard (with 30–45s listing video) is $280; Full Package — Pro (with 60–90s cinematic video) is $380
- All deliverables are returned within 24–48 hours of the shoot; 24-hour rush delivery is available for +$40
- Commercial drone work legally requires an FAA Part 107 certificate; CS Media is Part 107 certified
- No travel or mileage fees anywhere in Grayson County, KY; 6% sales tax and 2-way mileage from Leitchfield apply elsewhere
- Virtual staging is an add-on at +$25 per photo or +$50 per video scene
- Every package includes 1 free revision (2 on Pro); additional revisions are $15 each
- Service area covers all of Kentucky; out-of-state projects available on request
